build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run bundle:all && npm run build

security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob: https: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-eval' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' blob:; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ipc: http://ipc.localhost; worker-src 'self' blob:; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'self'; media-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*

bundle.longDescription: OVO runs every open LLM locally on Apple Silicon — MLX, GGUF via transformers, VLM, and more. Ships with a reactive SVG owl mascot that mirrors your coding state. HuggingFace-native, Ollama/OpenAI API compatible, optional Claude Code integration.
